description:
Header line: priority dot + status glyph/word + id + title + claimed-badge.
Then a compact metadata row: type, created (relative), updated (relative), tags.
Then relations: deps (with their statuses inline), gates, parent, children (for epics).
Then description, wrapped at $COLUMNS.
Then notes, newest first or oldest first — pick oldest-first since it reads as a log.

Relative timestamps (3d ago, 2h ago). --verbose adds absolute ISO timestamps in parens.

Example:
  ● » in_progress  bl-5678  Swap middleware                    ★ claimed by mark
    type: task      created: 3d ago       updated: 2h ago
    tags: api, auth

    deps:   bl-1234 ✓ closed   bl-2222 » in_progress
    gates:  —
    parent: bl-a3f8  Migrate auth layer

    description
      ...wrapped body...

    notes (2)
      2d ago  mark      — kicked off
      2h ago  reviewer  — please add tests for the 401 path

--json unchanged.
title: bl show redesign: header, relations block, notes, wrapping
